title: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (UPST) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Upstart Holdings reported Q1 earnings of $0.30 per share, falling short of analyst expectations. The company was projected to earn $0.39 per share, representing a negative surprise of approximately 22%. Despite the earnings miss, Upstart exceeded revenue forecasts. The firm generated $308.21 million in quarterly revenue, surpassing the consensus estimate by 6.52% and showing year-over-year growth from $213.37 million. The stock has declined significantly in 2026. Upstart shares have lost about 26.6% since the beginning of the year versus the S&P 500's gain of 5.2%. The company holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, with management commentary expected to influence near-term price movement. Forward guidance anticipates earnings of $2.36 per share on $1.4 billion in revenues for the full fiscal year.
